$comment: Reference CreateSharedStackInput for the acme-shared-services pilot — the hand-authored end-state a POST /workspaces/:ws/shared-stacks body would carry. It brings up the long-lived shared infra ONCE per workspace/machine: create + own `acme-net`, materialize `.env.shared`, up under the public `backends` profile (the CI-validatable, private-registry-free subset), sync database users, register Debezium connectors. The `peer`-profile services (private-registry images) are omitted here and gated behind the non-required registry-auth preflight. Validated against createSharedStackSchema by pilot-golden.logic.test.ts.
name: acme-shared-services

prerequisites.remediation: Install mkcert and run `mkcert -install` so the wildcard `*.acme.local` certificates this stack serves are trusted, then re-run.

Log in to the private image registry to enable the `peer`-profile services (cockroach, languagetool, okapi). Without it the public `backends` subset still comes up fully — this check is advisory, not blocking.
